channel.title: Read-Later on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Read-Later on Pi Stack

item.title: Linkwarden vs Wallabag vs Shaarli: Self-Hosted Read-Later Tools 2026
item.description: If you’ve ever bookmarked a page and never returned to it, you know the problem: browser bookmarks are disorganized, they don’t preserve content when pages go offline, and there’s no way to search across thousands of saved links. Self-hosted read-later tools solve this by archiving full page content, providing full-text search, and giving you complete control over your data.
